evidence_excerpt: The patient died 10 days later due to severe and progressive encephalopathy despite the specific anticancer treatment and high dose corticosteroids.

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: Deterioration resulted in a comatose state necessitating endotracheal intubation, sedation, and transfer to the intensive care unit.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: Developed multivectorial saccadic eye movements with associated massive myoclonic head, trunk, and limb movements, progressing to coma.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Despite the initiation of specific treatment, dramatic neurologic deterioration occurred with opsoclonus and massive myoclonic movements.
Progression to a comatose state requiring endotracheal intubation, sedation, and ICU transfer.
The patient died 10 days later due to severe and progressive encephalopathy.

notes_on_uncertainty: The patient died within 10 days of diagnosis/treatment initiation, so no long-term follow-up exists. Functional status and symptom burden reflect the latest documented condition after index time. Exact date of diagnosis relative to treatment start is not specified; diagnosis date was used as the index reference.
